Appearances:
Plaintiff, Yerba Buena Commons Associates is present. Represented by Mitch Brown
Attorney, Cindy Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Paulette Otten, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-21-2010 is vacated.
